notes: CML integration for CrewAI. timestamp field is RFC 3339 UTC with millisecond precision; the CrewAI listener normalizes started_at to that form before deriving the reference. Structural graph validation (uniqueness, parent resolution, acyclicity) is independent of signatures and external anchors.

vectors.description: Pinned baseline vector from CML test suite — confirms byte-identical derivation against action-ref-v1 spec.
